text.tspan: People living in democracies and non-democracies, World
Based on the classification and estimates by Boix et al. (2013). Democracies are understood here as political systems
in which political leaders are elected under broad rights for men and women to vote in free and fair elections.
Data source: Boix-Miller-Rosato (2022); Population based on various sources (2023)
